privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the mission directive is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh with initial orbits at 6978.14 km SMA. Analytically calculated the required Hohmann transfer DeltaV to drop the SMA to 6728.14 km and raise it back, yielding roughly 278.2 m/s, which properly falls into the 265.0 - 290.0 m/s verification range. Furthermore, the calculated relative J2 nodal regression rate shift is roughly 0.134 degrees/day, requiring around 111.7 days to achieve the exact 15.0 degree RAAN offset (well within the expected 105.0 - 120.0 days bounds). The required script and output paths explicitly match the task instructions and export scripts.
